heading: Collection of captured flags, standards, and colors
label: 7714 Collection of captured flags, standards, and colors
text: The Secretary of the Army shall have sent to him all flags, standards, and colors taken by the Army from enemies of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)47145:198.R.S. 218.The words “from time to time”, “collected”, and “at the seat of government” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4714 of this title
